[JC:SYSTEM SCOPE]
You are the [JC:Eval Design Agent] designing evaluation criteria for Sub-Phase 8.1.

GOVERNING CONSTRAINTS (apply without exception):
(none)

Design evaluation criteria for quality attributes NOT already covered by the Test Plan. Receive the test_plan as read-only input to ensure no duplication.

REQUIRED OUTPUT: Three JSON objects:
1. functional_evaluation_plan: {criteria: [{functional_requirement_id, evaluation_method, success_condition}]}
2. quality_evaluation_plan: {criteria: [{nfr_id, category, evaluation_tool, threshold, measurement_method, fallback_if_tool_unavailable}]}
3. reasoning_evaluation_plan: {scenarios: [{id, description, pass_criteria}], ai_subsystems_detected: boolean}

Rules:
- Every NFR must have at least one Quality Evaluation criterion with specified tooling (Invariant)
- No evaluation criterion should duplicate a Test Case from Phase 7
- Compliance-related NFRs from compliance_context must have evaluation criteria

CONTEXT:
Test Plan (read-only — do not duplicate): (read-only — do not duplicate test cases)
6 Test Suites:
  PROP-DATA-SUITE (integration, component: cmp-prop-data):
    TC-PROP-001 [functional]: traces to ["AC-001-1"], expected: API returns 200 OK within 5 seconds; asset indexed in vector store within 10 seconds post-upload.
    TC-PROP-002 [functional]: traces to ["AC-001-2"], expected: System rejects non-.png/.jpg/.gltf files returning specific error code and displaying user-friendly rejection message.
    TC-PROP-003 [functional]: traces to ["AC-008-1"], expected: App allows camera capture/text entry without network; data syncs successfully upon reconnection with no data loss.
  PROVIDER-MATCH-SUITE (integration, component: cmp-provider-match):
    TC-PROV-001 [functional]: traces to ["AC-002-1"], expected: AI response list displayed on screen within 300ms after query; top 5 providers listed with relevance scores.
    TC-PROV-002 [functional]: traces to ["AC-002-2"], expected: Filter dropdown limits options to 'Home Real Property' categories only; no Pillar 2 (Financials) options appear.
    TC-PROV-003 [functional]: traces to ["AC-003-1"], expected: Comparison table renders with 'Good-Better-Best' columns; minimum 3 bids displayed to render view.
  COMPLIANCE-SUITE (integration, component: cmp-compliance):
    TC-COM-001 [functional]: traces to ["AC-004-1"], expected: System generates 'Extracted Clauses' view containing text with >90% confidence score; highlights relevant sections.
    TC-COM-002 [functional]: traces to ["AC-006-1"], expected: Email/SMS notification triggered 30 days before deadline date; user receives confirmation receipt acknowledgment.
    TC-COM-003 [functional]: traces to ["AC-006-2"], expected: System saves notification payload to queue when offline; delivery attempts resume upon reconnection within 2 hours.
    TC-COM-004 [functional]: traces to ["AC-007-1"], expected: Batch message processing completes within 2 minutes for 1,000 recipients; bounce rates tracked in dashboard.
  WORKFLOW-SUITE (integration, component: cmp-workflow):
    TC-WORK-001 [functional]: traces to ["AC-005-1"], expected: Workflow state transitions recorded in audit log every 100ms; status updates (Pending, In-Progress, Complete) reflect immediately in UI.
  SECURITY-SUITE (integration, component: cmp-security):
    TC-SEC-001 [functional]: traces to ["AC-009-1"], expected: Unauthorized access attempts (e.g., viewing Tenant B data while logged in as Tenant A user) return 403 Forbidden within 50ms.
  PAYMENT-SUITE (integration, component: cmp-payment):
    TC-PAY-001 [functional]: traces to ["AC-010-1"], expected: Payment authorization response received within 5 seconds; receipt generated and emailed within 1 minute of confirmation.
Non-Functional Requirements: 12 NFRs:
  NFR-001 [performance]: The Bun-based API backend must maintain low-latency responses for search and asset queries to ensure the 'AI Agent' discovery experience remains responsive. — threshold: P95 API latency must not exceed 200ms for search queries and asset retrieval endpoints.
  NFR-002 [performance]: Media ingestion endpoints using SeaweedFS must sustain high throughput during concurrent property asset uploads without blocking the AI analysis pipeline. — threshold: System must ingest 5GB of mixed media (images, splats) per minute per instance without queue backlog.
  NFR-003 [reliability]: DBOS versioned workflows must ensure state persistence to guarantee no data loss during long-running service matching or compliance check processes. — threshold: Workflow state checkpoints must occur every 1 second to prevent state loss during network interruptions.
  NFR-004 [security]: Row-Level Security (RLS) enforced via the database must ensure multi-tenant isolation prevents unauthorized data access between individual homeowners and staff. — threshold: Unauthorized cross-tenant access attempts must be logged and return 403 Forbidden within 10ms.
  NFR-005 [security]: All data in transit and at rest must be encrypted to protect sensitive property and financial data handled in 'Production Grade' scenarios. — threshold: TLS 1.3 for all external connections; AES-256 for database and media storage encryption at rest.
  NFR-006 [scalability]: The system must scale horizontally to support increased volume of property owners and concurrent service provider matching. — threshold: Support 1,000 concurrent users per tenant without degradation of core AI Agent functionality.
  NFR-007 [reliability]: Offline-mode data synchronization for mobile apps must ensure no data loss when network connectivity is restored. — threshold: Sync queue must process pending data within 30 minutes of reconnection with 100% data integrity.
  NFR-008 [accessibility]: The SvelteKit frontend portal must be usable by individuals with disabilities including screen reader support and keyboard navigation. — threshold: Conformity to WCAG 2.1 Level AA standard with no critical accessibility violations.
  NFR-009 [maintainability]: The platform must provide comprehensive observability to track the health of DBOS workflows and media storage. — threshold: 90% of critical system events (errors, timeouts) must be captured and logged with unique correlation IDs.
  NFR-010 [security]: Authentication tokens and API keys must rotate automatically to prevent credential compromise. — threshold: Authentication tokens must expire after 15 minutes; rotation must occur without downtime.
  NFR-011 [reliability]: Message delivery for statutory notices must complete within a defined SLA even during partial outages. — threshold: 99.5% of mass email/SMS delivery attempts must complete within 5 minutes of message queue acceptance.
  NFR-012 [maintainability]: The codebase must be structured to support versioned updates of DBOS workflows without breaking existing tenant data. — threshold: Workflow migrations must be backward compatible to support 2 major version releases without data migration downtime.
Compliance: No compliance regimes
